title: SpaceX and Other Mega IPOs May Wait Years to Join the S&P 500
title_cn: SpaceX 和其他大型 IPO 可能要等待数年才能加入标准普尔 500 指数
summary: Mega-IPO candidates including SpaceX are expected to face a long road to entry to the S&P 500 Index, after the company that makes the rules rejected a proposal that included relaxing the requirement that they be profitable.

title: Becerra Advances for California Governor as Hilton Fights Steyer
title_cn: 希尔顿与斯泰尔较量，贝塞拉竞选加州州长
summary: Democratic former cabinet secretary Xavier Becerra is on track to advance in California’s governor’s race, setting up a November matchup that will hinge on whether Republican Steve Hilton or billionaire Tom Steyer claims the other run-off spot.

title: Indonesian Officials Vow Again to Stabilize Rupiah, Draw Inflows
title_cn: 印度尼西亚官员再次誓言稳定卢比，吸引资金流入
summary: Indonesia’s finance and central bank officials said they will step up efforts to stabilize the currency and attract inflows after a week where the nation’s stocks tumbled at the fastest pace worldwide and its currency sank to all-time lows.

title: Second US Screwworm Case Confirmed in Texas by USDA
title_cn: 美国农业部在德克萨斯州确认了第二例美国螺旋虫病例
summary: A second case of the deadly New World screwworm parasite has been confirmed in a Texas calf, heightening fears of a broader outbreak that could impact the US beef business.

title: US Drops $300 Million Fraud Case That Spotlighted Brian Kahn
title_cn: 美国撤销了布莱恩·卡恩 (Brian Kahn) 关注的 3 亿美元欺诈案
summary: US prosecutors dropped a $300 million fraud indictment against a former executive at Prophecy Asset Management accused of working with Brian Kahn, the disgraced founder of Franchise Group Inc., to cheat investors in their hedge fund.

title: Raizen Inks $13 Billion Out-of-Court Debt Deal With Creditors
title_cn: Raizen 与债权人签署 130 亿美元的庭外债务协议
summary: Raizen SA reached an out-of-court restructuring agreement with the majority of its creditors, marking a key step in the Brazilian sugar-and-ethanol producer’s efforts to rework its debt, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: KPMG Chief Economist Discusses Fed Rate Hike Expectations
title_cn: 毕马威首席经济学家讨论美联储加息预期
summary: Diane Swonk, KPMG Chief Economist, analyzed the current economic landscape, highlighting how improvements in the labor market and persistent service sector inflation are driving hawkish sentiment among Federal Reserve officials. She noted that bond market pricing reflects expectations of a 25 basis point rate hike in 2026, signaling a shift in monetary policy outlook. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Electrum-Backed Mexican Silver Miner Sinda Files for US IPO
title_cn: 受 Electrum 支持的墨西哥银矿商 Sinda 申请美国首次公开募股
summary: Sinda Ltd. filed for a US initial public offering, seeking to fund mining for silver in a historically productive part of Mexico.

title: Strong U.S. Jobs Report Lowers Recession Risks Despite Wage Growth Lagging Inflation
title_cn: 尽管工资增长落后于通胀，但强劲的美国就业报告降低了经济衰退风险
summary: Gene Sperling, President of Sperling Economic Strategies and former director of the National Economic Council, discussed the recent U.S. jobs report, highlighting that the headline numbers were stronger than expected and suggest a low likelihood of recession despite ongoing geopolitical and economic challenges. He noted that while job creation appears broad-based, some gains—such as the 70,000 hospitality jobs—may be influenced by seasonal factors like World Cup-related hiring. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq 100 Sinks 5% in AI-Led Rout as Yields Climb: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着收益率攀升，纳斯达克 100 指数在 AI 主导的溃败中下跌 5%：市场结束
summary: Wall Street’s historic weekly run came to a halt, with stocks hit by a tech selloff and higher bond yields after a solid jobs report added to bets the Federal Reserve’s next interest-rate move will be a hike.

title: Marvell Technology, Flex to Join S&P 500 Later This Month
title_cn: Marvell Technology 和 Flex 将于本月晚些时候加入标准普尔 500 指数
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. and Flex Ltd. will join the S&P 500 in the latest quarterly rebalance, S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday.

title: Tech Selloff, Bitcoin Drop Test Retail Investor Strength Ahead of SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 科技股抛售、比特币下跌考验散户投资者在 SpaceX IPO 前的实力
summary: For years, Wall Street has benefited from one of the most reliable forces in modern markets: a retail-trader army willing to buy almost anything.

title: Goldman’s Flood Sees Buying Opportunity in Stock Market Selloff
title_cn: 高盛的洪水在股市抛售中看到了买入机会
summary: Friday’s pullback in US equities offers a chance to add exposure rather than a reason to retreat, with a clear path for the S&P 500 to reach 8,000 this year, according to John Flood, the head of Americas equities execution services at Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

title: Canada’s TerraVest Slides as Warrant Alleges Insider Tipping
title_cn: 加拿大 TerraVest 因内部泄密指控而股价下跌
summary: Shares of Canadian manufacturer TerraVest Industries Inc. closed down the most since 2011 over allegations of insider tipping by its executive chairman.

title: Beating the S&P For Generations: Masters in Business with Chris Davis
title_cn: 几代人击败标准普尔：克里斯·戴维斯 (Chris Davis) 的商业硕士
summary: Barry sits down with Chris Davis,  Chairman and Portfolio Manager at Davis Funds. They discuss his approach to managing risk and the key elements changing the economy. Chris and Barry also discuss Chris's mentors including Charlie Munger, and how he settled into the family business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar Gains as Resilient Job Market Boosts Fed Hike Bets
title_cn: 就业市场富有弹性推动美联储加息押注，美元上涨
summary: The dollar posted its best day in more than two months on Friday as traders priced in higher interest rates after new data revealed a stronger labor market than expected.

title: Emerging-Market Currencies Plunge on Blowout US Jobs Report
title_cn: 美国就业报告井喷，新兴市场货币暴跌
summary: Currencies in the developing world sank after a blowout US jobs report provided the clearest sign yet that the labor market is breaking out of a prolonged period of lackluster hiring, undercutting the case for rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.

title: JPMorgan Turns Rosy on Tesla a Day After Dimon Lauds Musk
title_cn: 戴蒙称赞马斯克一天后，摩根大通对特斯拉的看法变得乐观
summary: The morning after Jamie Dimon offered Elon Musk an audience to talk up SpaceX, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s new lead autos analyst completely changed the bank’s tune on Tesla Inc.

title: Earnings and AI-Driven CapEx as Key to Sustained Gains
title_cn: 盈利和人工智能驱动的资本支出是持续收益的关键
summary:
Katherine Bordlethwait, Goldman Sachs asset management co head of equity client portfolio management, discussed the current equity market environment amid record highs and strong investor enthusiasm. She emphasized that continued earnings growth is critical for the market to sustain its momentum, noting that corporate profits as a percentage of GDP are at a record high.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq 100 Slides 4.8% as Traders Dump Tech, Buy Defensive Names
title_cn: 交易员抛售科技股、买入防御性股票，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌 4.8%
summary: The massive months-long rally in US stocks took a painful turn on Friday as traders rushed to dump mega-cap technology stocks and snap up more defensive names, while the latest employment data boosted expectations for an interest-rate hike this year.

title: Private Credit Deterioration Slow, Contained: Robson
title_cn: 私人信贷恶化缓慢且得到遏制：罗布森
summary: Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, and Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Cliffwater, Blackstone, and Partners Group all capped certain fund redemptions this week. The moves put private markets back into the spotlight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: This Jobs Report Will Not Help the Fed, Says JPM's Berro
title_cn: 摩根大通的贝罗表示，这份就业报告对美联储没有帮助
summary: Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." She says the May monthly jobs report won't help the Federal Reserve because it's still so concerned about the inflation outlook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Knicks Economy and the Actual Economy
title_cn: 尼克斯经济与实际经济
summary: Some thoughts on the NBA finals and inflation.

title: US Bonds Slide as Strong Jobs Data Fuels Bets on 2026 Fed Hike
title_cn: 由于强劲的就业数据推动对 2026 年美联储加息的押注，美国债券下滑
summary: Bond traders fully priced in a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by the end of this year after US job growth topped all forecasts in May, spurring yields higher in the $31 trillion Treasuries market.

title: Citigroup Economists Maintain Lonely Call for Fed Rate Cuts
title_cn: 花旗集团经济学家仍然孤独地呼吁美联储降息
summary: Unswayed by strong US jobs data released Friday, economists at Citigroup Inc. are maintaining their increasingly lonely prediction that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates three times this year.

title: Security Logistics In Focus As World Cup Countdown Begins
title_cn: 世界杯倒计时开始，安全物流成为焦点
summary: Dan Arnold, SVP of National Operations at Protos Security and Vanessa Perdomo-Maglione, Bloomberg 'Business of Sports' Podcast Host join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the importance of security as the World Cup countdown begins.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Erases 2026 Gains as Jobs Report Fuels Fed Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 就业报告助长美联储加息押注，金价回吐 2026 年涨幅
summary: Gold erased this year’s gains as robust US jobs data fueled bets that the Federal Reserve will likely raise interest rates in 2026, a headwind for the precious metal.

title: Find Out Scarlet and Tom's Must-Read Books
title_cn: 找出斯嘉丽和汤姆的必读书籍
summary: Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene discuss their must-read books on the debut episode of "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: These Market Dips Are 'Buying Opportunities' Says John Flood
title_cn: 约翰·弗拉德表示，这些市场下跌是“买入机会”
summary: Natalia Kniazhevich, Bloomberg News Equities Reporter and John Flood, Goldman Sachs Partner and Head of Americas Equities Execution Services join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the markets and investors should be thinking about on days when the markets are volatile. Wall Street’s historic weekly run came to a halt, with stocks hit by a tech selloff and higher bond yields as a solid jobs report added to bets the Federal Reserve’s next rate move will be a hike. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New York Summer Camp Charging $16,750 Files for Bankruptcy
title_cn: 纽约夏令营收费16,750美元申请破产
summary: Simad Holdings, the operator of youth sleep-away camps in the Northeast including a popular retreat in New York’s Catskill mountains charging $16,750 for the summer, has filed for bankruptcy.

title: Pelican Products Make Big Bet On Defense
title_cn: 鹈鹕产品在防御方面下了大赌注
summary: Pelican Products CEO JC Curleigh joins Open Interest to talk about how the iconic protective case maker is finding fresh momentum in defense, as drones reshape military logistics. He details why Pelican is partnering earlier with defense innovators, how US factories are scaling production, and why premium protection still commands premium pricing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Week | AI-era Internet, Spaceport Investment, Bolivia’s Investability
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | AI时代互联网、航天港投资、玻利维亚的可投资性
summary: This week, the dollar remains the world’s dominant currency, but economist Ken Rogoff thinks rising debt and geopolitical shifts are eroding its position as the world’s reserve currency. And, AI-powered search is reducing web traffic, forcing publishers to rethink how they attract audiences and generate revenue online. Will competition between the US and China to launch satellites create the next major infrastructure boom in the commercial space industry? Bolivia wants to benefit from foreign capital flows into Latin America and harness its mineral reserves, but political instability remains a significant challenge.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Discussion on the Iconoclast Dinner Experience and Its Cultural Impact
title_cn: 讨论反传统晚餐体验及其文化影响
summary: Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer, shared her involvement with the Iconoclast dinner experience, highlighting its significance as a coveted event in the culinary world. She described how the event, founded by Dr. Leslie, has been developed over eleven years to identify and bring together top influencers and power players in culinary cuisine. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Sell-Off Analyzed Amid NASDAQ 100 Decline and Rising Yields
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数下跌和收益率上升期间的市场抛售分析
summary: Jeremy Siegel, Professor Emeritus of Finance at the Wharton School, discussed the recent market sell-off during a live financial news segment. The conversation focused on the sharp decline in the NASDAQ 100, which was described as an AI-led rout coinciding with climbing yields. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The $200 Billion Data Center Transforming Louisiana
title_cn: 耗资 2000 亿美元的数据中心正在改变路易斯安那州
summary: Meta's Mark Zuckerberg wanted to build a massive data center. And Louisiana leaders wanted Meta to choose their state as its home. But making that happen took a lot of negotiation — and secrecy. Bloomberg reporter Riley Griffin takes host Sarah Holder inside the deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DocuSign Shares Drop After Full-Year Guidance Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 全年指引令投资者失望后 DocuSign 股价下跌
summary: DocuSign's shares declined amid a broadly negative market day following the company's full-year guidance, which failed to excite investors. Allan Thygesen, CEO of DocuSign, discussed the company's AI-powered intelligent agreement management platform, highlighting strong adoption with 40,000 customers currently live on the platform. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jobs Report Fuels Fed-Rate Hike Bets | The Close 6/5/2026
title_cn: 就业报告助长美联储加息押注收盘价 6/5/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Edward Jones Head of Investment Strategy Mona Mahajan, Docusign CEO Allan Thygesen, Guggenheim Partners Senior Analyst of Retail & Commerce Simeon Siegel, Sperling Economics President Gene Sperling, Interactive Brokers Chief Strategist Steve Sosnick, Wharton School Professor Emeritus of Finance Jeremy Siegel, KPMG Chief Economist Diane Swank, DVx Ventures Co-Founder & Partner Karim Bousta, & Former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer Esi Eggleston Bracey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Inks $30 Billion Computing Power Deal With Google
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Google 签署价值 300 亿美元的计算能力协议
summary: Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz breaks down a busy week in SpaceX news, as the aerospace company prepares for an IPO. SpaceX and Google entered into an agreement for cloud services where Google has agreed to pay SpaceX $920 million per month for computing, something Lipschultz says is indicative of the expansion of the scope of work SpaceX is looking to do.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo Wraps Up $35 Billion Debt to Buy AI Chips for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 偿还 350 亿美元债务，为 Anthropic 购买人工智能芯片
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic PBC to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the artificial intelligence race.

title: Google-Tied Prepaid Energy Bonds See Flood of Muni Trader Demand
title_cn: 与谷歌挂钩的预付能源债券迎来了市政交易者的大量需求
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc.’s municipal-bond market debut was met by a surge of investor interest.

title: SpaceX Inks $30 Billion Computing Power Deal With Google
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Google 签署价值 300 亿美元的计算能力协议
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google has agreed to pay Elon Musk’s SpaceX $920 million a month for computing power as part of a cloud services deal that runs through mid-2029, its second such agreement with an AI competitor in a matter of weeks.

title: Tech Leaders Mull the Next Phase of AI as Top Labs Plan IPOs
title_cn: 顶级实验室计划首次公开募股，技术领导者正在考虑人工智能的下一阶段
summary: Executives and academics discuss the new unknowns emerging for AI

title: Bloomberg Money 6/5/2026
title_cn: 彭博财经 2026 年 6 月 5 日
summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Today's guests: Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders and JPMorgan Asset Management Chief Market Strategist for Americas Gabriela Santos.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Considers Raising Billions in Share Sale, FT Reports
title_cn: 据《金融时报》报道，Meta 考虑通过出售股票筹集数十亿美元
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is considering raising equity after Alphabet Inc.’s successful $85 billion sale, according to the Financial Times. Meta shares fell on the report.

title: Rubrik CEO's Big AI Warning
title_cn: Rubrik 首席执行官的大人工智能警告
summary: Rubrik CEO Bipul Sinha explains why AI is transforming cybersecurity, warns that AI agents bring "100x more risk," and discusses how businesses must shift from preventing attacks to rapidly recovering from them. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P’s SpaceX Snub Shows Elon Musk the Power of Index Gatekeepers
title_cn: 标准普尔对 SpaceX 的冷遇向埃隆·马斯克展示了指数看门人的力量
summary: Elon Musk once said passive investing has “gone too far,” mocked environmental, social and governance indexes as a “scam” and endured a long wait to get Tesla Inc. into the S&P 500.

title: Tech Trade Under Pressure; Musk Sells His Vision of the Future | Bloomberg Tech 6/05/2026
title_cn: 科技贸易面临压力；马斯克兜售他的未来愿景彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 5 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Elon Musk's vision of the future and how he enchanted investors even as he brushed aside questions about the SpaceX IPO at an investor event. Plus, he takes a look at May's hot jobs report even as tech stocks are under pressure with investors reassessing the path for interest rates. And, he recaps conversations with three of the biggest names in AI at the Bloomberg Tech event in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Weighs Secondary Share Sale at $115 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Revolut 考虑以 1150 亿美元估值进行二次出售
summary: Revolut Ltd. is looking to run a secondary share sale that would value the digital bank at $115 billion, on the heels of receiving a UK bank license and applying for a charter in the US, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Index Ventures' Achadjian on Backing Ex-SpaceX Workers
title_cn: Index Ventures 的 Achadjian 支持前 SpaceX 员工
summary: Software has dominated venture capital for years, but as AI moves beyond the digital world and into manufacturing, robotics, and industrial systems, investors are betting the next trillion-dollar opportunities wraps software into the physical world. Nina Achadjian, partner at Index Ventures, an early backer of companies including Anthropic, Physical Intelligence, and ServiceTitan, discusses the next frontier in AI and the SpaceX IPO's significance on the venture space. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apex Is the 'Ford' of Satellites, Says CEO
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，Apex 是卫星界的“福特”
summary: Ian Cinnamon, Apex CEO, joins after the company raised more than $200 million as it works to increase production of satellite platforms for commercial firms and government work, including the development of President Trump's Golden Dome missile defense shield. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Orbital Data Centers Face Space-Based Challenges
title_cn: 轨道数据中心面临天基挑战
summary: Philip Johnston, Starcloud CEO, joins to discuss the challenges of building and maintaining orbital data centers in space, this as SpaceX says it wants to ultimately deploy 100 gigawatts of AI compute capacity in orbit. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Not Holding Back Companies From Hiring: Yale Budget Lab
title_cn: 人工智能不会阻碍公司招聘：耶鲁预算实验室
summary: The May jobs report came in stronger than expected, but tech stocks are under pressure as investors reassess the path for interest rates. Martha Gimbel, executive director of the Yale Budget Lab, sees no major AI impact in economic data. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: YouTube Creators Are Coming to a Theater Near You
title_cn: YouTube 创作者将来到您附近的剧院
summary:
This week, the Everybody's Business podcast asked moviegoers which summer movies they are most excited to see.

Bloomberg's Lucas Shaw joins Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to unpack why movies like Backrooms and Obsession coming from two young, YouTube-famous directors, have become surprise hits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’ Scares Away All the Other Video Games
title_cn: 《侠盗猎车手 VI》吓跑了所有其他电子游戏
summary: September has become the most crowded release month of the year as publishers steer clear of Rockstar’s game

title: Data Centers Have a New Adversary: Tigers and Leopards at a Zoo
title_cn: 数据中心有了新的对手：动物园里的老虎和豹子
summary: A proposal for a data center in Nashville is facing off against the leopards and tigers of the city’s zoo.

title: AI Presents Existential Crisis for Wealth Managers
title_cn: 人工智能给财富管理机构带来了生存危机
summary: A growing share of people say they trust AI enough to provide financial advice, and many are using it to make investment decisions, which could disrupt the wealth management industry. Suzanne Woolley has more on the debut episode of "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Space Startup Apex Raises $200 Million, Doubles Valuation
title_cn: 太空初创公司 Apex 融资 2 亿美元，估值翻倍
summary: Space startup Apex announced that it had raised more than $200 million as it works to increase production of satellite platforms for commercial firms and government work, including the development of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome missile defense shield.

title: LinkedIn Co-Founder Reid Hoffman to Leave Microsoft’s Board
title_cn: LinkedIn 联合创始人 Reid Hoffman 将离开微软董事会
summary: Reid Hoffman, the LinkedIn co-founder and venture capitalist, will leave Microsoft Corp.’s board later this year, saying he wants to focus on his new artificial intelligence company.

title: DocuSign Drops on Earnings; Coinbase Down on Bitcoin Decline | Stock Movers
title_cn: DocuSign 盈利下降；比特币下跌，Coinbase 下跌 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Lululemon (LULU) shares are lower after it lowered its annual forecast due to deteriorating performance in North America.
- DocuSign (DOCU) shares are lower after reporting earnings. While it reported a rise in 1st quarter profit, the annual recurring revenue rate was unchanged and investors may be looking for a return to double digit growth.
- Coinbase (COIN) shares are lower as Bitcoin slides below $62,000 this morning. Ether is also declining. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Minnis Says AI Boom Is ‘Fundamental, Generational’ Force Driving Markets and Economy
title_cn: 高盛的明尼斯表示，人工智能的繁荣是推动市场和经济的“根本性、代际性”力量
summary: The boom in artificial intelligence investment is a “fundamental, generational” phenomenon driving markets and filtering through to the economy at large, Christina Minnis, global head of the alternatives origination group at Goldman Sachs, says in an interview with Bloomberg News' Davide Scigliuzzo at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thailand May Seek Thaksin Bankruptcy Over $538 Million Tax Debt
title_cn: 泰国可能因5.38亿美元税收债务寻求他信破产
summary: Thailand’s Revenue Department said it may pursue bankruptcy proceedings against former Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra if it is unable to fully recover 17.6 billion baht ($538 million) in outstanding tax liabilities.

title: Anwar’s Battle Against Allies Shapes Up as Key Malaysian States Call Polls
title_cn: 马来西亚主要州举行民意调查，安瓦尔与盟友的斗争即将展开
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s grip on power is set to be tested as he prepares to face off against his erstwhile allies, with his party’s urban base in play in two upcoming state elections.

title: US Adds 172,000 Jobs in May, Topping All Estimates | Balance of Power: Late Edition 6/5/2026
title_cn: 美国 5 月份新增就业岗位 172,000 个，超出所有预期权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 6 月 5 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Heather Boushey, Former White House Council of Economic Advisers Member, says the 172,000 jobs added in the month of May is good sign for the US economy, but warns that 'we're not out of the woods yet,' Neil Bradley, US Chamber of Commerce Executive VP, discusses the latest US jobs report and says while consumers are worried, 'they haven't pulled back on spending,' and Carl Skau, Acting Executive Director of the UN World Food Programme, says the world has seen a 'three-fold' increase in world hunger over the last five years and discusses the humanitarian crises in the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Standoff Drags On as Conflict Nears 100-Day Mark
title_cn: 冲突接近 100 天，美伊对峙持续
summary: The US and Iran remained at loggerheads over any potential truce heading into the weekend, with the conflict nearing the 100-day mark and Tehran saying that it and Oman have sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: WFP's Skau on Middle East Crisis and Global Hunger
title_cn: 世界粮食计划署斯考谈中东危机和全球饥饿
summary: Carl Skau, Acting Executive Director of the UN World Food Programme, says the world has seen a 'three-fold' increase in world hunger over the last five years and discusses the humanitarian crises in the Middle East as well as countries like Sudan and Sri Lanka. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why India’s Gen-Z ‘Cockroach’ Movement Is a Worry for Modi
title_cn: 为什么印度 Z 世代“蟑螂”运动令莫迪担忧
summary: What started out as a social media joke among Gen Z is turning into an irritant for the political establishment in India, as the “Cockroach Janta Party” draws support from young people frustrated by a lack of jobs and a string of controversies in the education system.

title: Bradley Talks Jobs, Government Stakes in AI Companies
title_cn: 布拉德利谈论就业和政府在人工智能公司中的股份
summary: Neil Bradley, US Chamber of Commerce Executive VP, discusses the latest US jobs report and says while consumers are worried, 'they haven't pulled back on spending yet.' He also spoke out against the government having stake in AI companies, saying it would 'break down the wall' between government and the private sector. Neil speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boushey Discusses Jobs Report, Wages and Inflation
title_cn: 布希讨论就业报告、工资和通货膨胀
summary: Heather Boushey, Former White House Council of Economic Advisers Member, says the 172,000 jobs added in the month of May is good sign for the US economy, but warns that 'we're not out of the woods yet.' She also discusses the effect of stagnant wages and rising prices on the US consumer and says 'families are really challenged.' Heather speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Army Warns Lawmakers Draft Legislation Risks Data Center Push
title_cn: 美国陆军警告立法者草案立法风险推动数据中心发展
summary: The US Army has warned against lawmakers’ efforts to increase oversight for Defense Department data centers, saying the proposals risk jeopardizing efforts to build the facilities on military bases just as demand for computing power soars.

title: FIFA Will Let Fans Bring Bottled Water to World Cup Matches, With Some Caveats
title_cn: 国际足联将允许球迷携带瓶装水观看世界杯比赛，但有一些注意事项
summary: FIFA is offering assurances to New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani that fans may bring water into World Cup stadiums — within certain rules.

title: Trump Pledges ‘Good Things’ for Farmers Without Giving Details
title_cn: 特朗普承诺为农民提供“好事”，但没有透露细节
summary: Donald Trump said that farmers would see “good things” happen in the coming months, as the president sought to bolster his relationship an agriculture industry who have been battered by his tariffs as well as high fuel and fertilizer costs triggered by his war with Iran.

title: Tech Stocks Lead Selloff Amid Strong Jobs Report | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/5/2026
title_cn: 就业报告强劲，科技股领跌彭博商业周刊日报 6/5/2026
summary: Today, Mike Mckee and Ira Jersey break down a strong May jobs report, as the US ads 172,000 jobs in the last month. Then, Goldman Sachs partner John Flood joins Natalia Kniazhevich to discuss the market outlook as tech stocks lead a major selloff. Plus, Dan Arnold, SVP of national operations at Protos Security, and Bloomberg's Vanessa Perdomo-Maglione talk security challenges of the upcoming World Cup and how US cities are preparing to deal with millions of fans flooding into town. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Signs AI Memo Addressing Issues in Anthropic-Pentagon Feud
title_cn: 特朗普签署人工智能备忘录，解决人类与五角大楼之间的不和问题
summary: US national security agencies must make a priority of working with more than one artificial intelligence provider, according to a memo from President Donald Trump that follows an extended feud between the Pentagon and Anthropic PBC, which until recently was the only vendor approved for classified military use.

title: Trump Signals Interest in US Owning Stakes in Top AI Labs
title_cn: 特朗普表示有兴趣在美国顶级人工智能实验室中持有股份
summary: President Donald Trump expressed interest in the US government holding equity stakes in leading artificial intelligence developers, saying that he planned to discuss the idea of a partnership with AI companies’ executives as soon as next week.

title: Senate Passes ICE, CBP Funding | Balance of Power 6/5/2025
title_cn: 参议院通过 ICE 和 CBP 资助 |权力平衡 6/5/2025
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, former Chief of Staff to Vice President Mike Pence Marc Short, Arbroath Group Managing Partner Christopher Smart and Navigator Research Managing Director Melissa Toufanian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congress Feels the Heat and Crypto Faces Winter
title_cn: 国会感受到热度，加密货币面临冬天
summary: The legislative pipeline is full, with measures upcoming on digital currencies, spy powers and housing

title: Vance Faults UK Over Nowak’s Death as Rift Widens Between Allies
title_cn: 盟友之间裂痕扩大，万斯因诺瓦克之死指责英国
summary: US Vice President JD Vance blamed European leaders’ embrace of “the politics of self-hatred” for the death of teenager Henry Nowak in the UK, in an inflammatory post that laid bare the growing rift between the two allies over their handling of immigration.

title: Trump’s Foreign Policy Agenda Runs Into Election-Year GOP Angst
title_cn: 特朗普的外交政策议程陷入选举年共和党的焦虑
summary: Two congressional votes this week offered an early warning sign that President Donald Trump’s foreign policy agenda faces growing resistance from members of his own party.

title: Trump’s Inner Circle Subpoenaed by BBC in US Libel Lawsuit
title_cn: 特朗普核心圈子在美国诽谤诉讼中被 BBC 传唤
summary: The British Broadcasting Corp. issued a wave of subpoenas to dozens of members of President Donald Trump’s inner circle as part of its defense in his $10 billion defamation lawsuit, raising fresh questions about Trump’s speech before the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the Capitol.

title: Ex-Giuliani Ally, Impeachment Figure Parnas Seeks Congress Seat
title_cn: 前朱利安尼盟友、弹劾人物帕纳斯寻求国会席位
summary: Lev Parnas, a key figure during the first impeachment of Donald Trump who helped get a US ambassador ousted before turning against the president, plans to run for Congress in a heavily contested race for a South Florida seat.

title: US Forces See Nearly 1,000 Hormuz Crossings Since Ceasefire
title_cn: 自停火以来，美军发现近 1,000 次穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: American forces have counted nearly 1,000 commercial vessel transits in and out of the Strait of Hormuz in the last two months, according to an official familiar with US Central Command operations, a figure that’s higher than private sector estimates that rely mostly on ship transponders.

title: Alberta’s Separatists Are Losing Big in Latest Opinion Polls
title_cn: 艾伯塔省的分离主义者在最新的民意调查中损失惨重
summary: Only two in 10 Albertans want to hold a binding referendum on whether the province should stay in Canada, according to a new Ipsos poll.

title: Miami Moves to Seize Part of Posh Island After Fuel Fight
title_cn: 迈阿密在燃料争夺战后采取行动夺取豪华岛的部分地区
summary: Miami’s mayor is moving to forcibly acquire 10 acres of land on Fisher Island, one of the priciest ZIP codes in the US, from real estate developers who want to replace a maritime fuel facility with swanky new condominiums.

title: Trump Says US Still Weighing Share Sale for Fannie, Freddie
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国仍在考虑出售房利美、房地美的股票
summary: President Donald Trump said his administration is still considering a public offering of shares in mortgage giants Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, days after he said he was appointing his top housing official to oversee the government’s network of intelligence agencies.

title: Trump Says He Supports Salary Cap for Major League Baseball
title_cn: 特朗普表示他支持美国职业棒球大联盟的工资上限
summary: President Donald Trump sided with Major League Baseball owners who are proposing a hard salary cap as part of the next collective bargaining agreement, adding his voice to a contentious negotiation with the league’s players union.

title: Trump Says He, Not Congress, Is in Charge of Kennedy Center in Reversal
title_cn: 特朗普称肯尼迪中心的负责人是他，而不是国会
summary: President Donald Trump floated that he’d remain in charge of the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts just days after he said Congress would retain control over the institution.

title: Talarico Orders a Texas BBQ Feast After Paxton’s ‘Vegan’ Jab
title_cn: 在帕克斯顿的“素食”疫苗接种后，塔拉里科订购了德克萨斯州烧烤盛宴
summary: James Talarico picked at the brisket with his bare hands and polished off a rack of pork ribs. Sausage links and “Texas Twinkies” — stuffed jalapeño peppers wrapped in bacon — crowded the butcher paper on his overflowing tray of smoked meats. The best bite, he said, was a lemony concoction of pork chunks called “brakes.”

title: EU Works to Sanction Israeli Minister Who Berated Activists
title_cn: 欧盟致力于制裁斥责活动人士的以色列部长
summary: The European Union has begun work on imposing sanctions on Israel’s national security minister, Itamar Ben-Gvir, over his treatment of activists who were trying to get aid into Gaza by sea, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Turkey, NATO Eye Pipeline Expansion to Bolster Fuel Security
title_cn: 土耳其和北约关注管道扩建以加强燃料安全
summary: Turkey is trying to connect underground fuel pipelines as part of a $28 billion infrastructure expansion by NATO to enhance the alliance’s fuel security, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Key US House Committee Preparing Legislation to Forge Crypto Tax Structure
title_cn: 美国众议院主要委员会正在准备立法以制定加密货币税收结构
summary: A House panel with jurisdiction over tax policy is preparing legislation that would grant cryptocurrency holders greater flexibility in reporting gains on investments, a potential boon for the digital asset industry.
